description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) in manual mode was traveling northwest on 5th Street, preparing to turn right onto Shipley Street in San 
Francisco, when it encountered an e-bike also traveling northwest on 5th Street in the bike lane. The Zoox vehicle operator braked hard to 
yield to the e-bike as it started to cross Shipley Street. Subsequently, a following motorcyclist rear ended the Zoox vehicle. The motorcyclist 
refused to exchange information. The Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage to the rear bumper. There were no reported injuries, and the 
police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
